source_name: US Dept of Commerce (CHIPS Program Office)
notes: Preliminary memoranda-of-terms announced (TSMC ~$6.6B, Intel ~$8.5B prelim, GlobalFoundries $1.5B). Obligated/announced, NOT cash disbursed.

source_name: US Dept of Commerce (CHIPS Program Office)
notes: ~$33B of awards finalized across TSMC, Intel ($7.86B final), Micron, Samsung, GlobalFoundries, etc. Obligated against the $52.7B headline; actual cash DISBURSED is milestone-gated and far smaller (low single-digit $B). Basis = obligated, not disbursed.

SoftBank CFO conceded in Aug-2025 the venture is taking longer than anticipated; first Abilene TX site only partially under construction, far short of the 10GW / $500B over-4-years pace. No reliable realized-dollar figure -> tracked via pace flag only.
AI gigafactory calls/site selection under way through 2025; little of the ~EUR20B genuinely-new public money disbursed yet and the ~EUR150B private mobilization is unverified. Pace flag only.
AI Compute Access Fund and Sovereign Compute rollout under way in 2025 on the 5-yr schedule; no per-year disbursement figure pinned yet. Pace flag only.
IndiaAI Mission GPU procurement progressing (tens of thousands of GPUs empaneled for subsidized compute). Rollout on schedule; no cumulative disbursement figure pinned. Pace flag only.
